## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes, no api changes)
- [ ] Documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?
<!-- Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes. -->

- [ ] Manual verification in local environment
- [ ] Linting and build checks passed

## Architectural Compliance
- [ ] Does this PR violate the Modular Monolith pattern? (If yes, please explain why)
- [ ] Are game engines isolated in their own modules?
- [ ] Is immutability preserved in state transitions?

## Checklist:

- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings.
